title: Widescreen cull widening (widenCullHorizontal) may make auto-aim aspect-ratio-dependent — render->sim coupling
repro: run identical input tapes at 4:3 vs widescreen; diff sim-state hashes; if diverge, decide accept+document vs decouple sim-visible read from widened render cull (chr.c:5205 room_rendered->auto-aim)

history.note: Survey F3. GoldenRecomp independently hit this (widescreen cull ±4 screens desync attract demos; they revert to stock in demoMode/Jungle intro). Feeds FID-0033: extend 0-tick purity fuzz to cover widescreen/cull state on render-only frames.

VERDICT: aspect-dependent gameplay CONFIRMED. A/B replay of baselines/tapes/dam_forward_30s.ge7tape (level dam, determinism envelope, only aspect varied via GE007_WINDOW_WIDTH/HEIGHT 960x720 vs 1280x720) diverges: 4:3 sim-hash=9a17e103b4ad437a, 16:9=b29050401571502c. Per-region breakdown (GE007_SIM_HASH_PER_REGION): ONLY prop_pool differs (guard/prop sim state) 873cce37ffb5ae3a vs a475fe7af0d2f72c; pool + g_BgRoomInfo (room_rendered) identical at final frame. Frame-lock (GE007_SIM_HASH_EVERY_FRAME): FIRST divergence at global=1 (first sim tick), region prop_pool, BEFORE g_BgRoomInfo diverges -> coupling is the DIRECT frustum-plane path, not the room_rendered read-back. Root cause: widenCullHorizontal (src/game/bondview.c:2064) widens the horizontal frustum-plane bss globals in sub_GAME_7F0785DC; those planes are read by SIM visibility tests camIsPosInScreen/camIsPosInScreenBox/sub_GAME_7F054D6C -> chrIsPosOffScreen (chrlv.c:12719) + object/guard detection (chrobjhandler.c:11045), so an edge guard/object is on-screen earlier at 16:9 than at retail 4:3. PROOF widenCull is SOLE cause: with GE007_NO_CULL_ASPECT_FIX=1 both aspects are BYTE-IDENTICAL (9a17e103b4ad437a). Class: parity-divergence. Byte-identity of diagnostics verified vs clean-main build (identical hashes all aspects). Fix (clean decouple: sim tests read faithful 4:3 frustum, render cull stays widened) is NON-TRIVIAL (shared plane globals) -> ACT deferred to follow-on. Regression lane tools/fidelity/aspect_cull_coupling_smoke.sh PASSES (invariant: widen-OFF aspect-invariant; characterization: widen-ON diverges).

notes: FID-0014 cross-note (2026-07-11): the patrol WAYMODE_MAGIC fix introduced portRetailFrustumEnter/Leave — a byte-save/restore scope that runs the sim-consumed visibility test under retail UNWIDENED frustum planes (US 0x7F0785DC has no widescreen widening). This makes the patrol-magic lifecycle aspect-INVARIANT by construction, shrinking FID-0058's coupling surface to the remaining targeting/auto-aim consumers of widenCullHorizontal, and the suppress/byte-restore scope is exactly the reusable mechanism a full FID-0058 fix wants (apply the same retail-plane scope around the auto-aim visibility reads). See FID-0014 derivation + the FID-0014 review (0C/4I).
